title: Sirius
description: Full fledged 1.20.1 Hardcore Survival RPG experience
body:
**Modpack made for a complete vanilla survival rpg experience, which takes as a base the 1.20.1 best fabric mods to date.**

Suggestions, comments and recommendations to [Discord](https://discord.gg/gmUDdY2s)

_Minimum recommended 10 GB ram and GPU RTX 3060_

 ✔️ Shader and PBR textures compatibility with [Distant horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)
 
 ✔️ 300+ Seamless Mods stability
 
 ✔️ Balanced and complex gameplay weapons, tools, gear and blocks limited by personal level, talent, jobs and skill builds ([Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills), [Tieredz](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz), [Combat & RPG series](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr))

 ✔️ Build for multiplayer and social recommend ([e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) included)

 ✔️ Flagships modded core mechanics changes ([Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Valkyrien skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies), [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric))

 ✔️ Extreme hardcore mob setup ([Eldritch mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/eldritch-mobs), [Nox renoxed](https://modrinth.com/mod/nox-renoxed), [Mob captains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-captains))
